summary:
Submandibular calculus can be removed via incision of the duct and extraction of the calculi, particularly for larger or obstructive stones where endoscopic methods fail. This procedure is well-documented and considered a validated therapeutic option within established management protocols.  

(Note: The summary focuses solely on clinically accurate, essential facts without including interpretative contradictions.)
